programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Police begin to doubt a man's claim that his wife was murdered by a friend.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An Idaho woman's affair with her married boss leads to a lethal confrontation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The brutal murder of Michelle Young, who was pregnant with her second child when she was killed while her husband was away on business.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After shedding hundreds of pounds, a popular kindergarten teacher goes missing; investigators find a link between her weight loss and her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When Tina Sandoval disappears, her parents and loved ones spend years searching for her; a secret she was keeping may lead to clues about what happened to her.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a young, handsome veterinarian is found dead in his home in Montana, the mystery remains unsolved for nearly two decades.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A wife and mother survives an attack in her home and a shot to the head; authorities search for a motive.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A charismatic pastor's dark secrets come to light after his wife's mysterious death; the case shattered a congregation and exposed the cost of their unshakable trust.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman and her dogs disappear from their home.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When police find a prominent lawyer dead and his girlfriend bound in duct tape, their investigation leads to a surprising suspect.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Two suspects are arrested for the murder of a millionaire 15 years after the crime was committed.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly pulls off his most epic prank at Vinny's book signing. Angelina arrives and immediately starts stirring the pot with the suitemates.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Angelina turns the night into a disaster when she gets into everyone's business. Derynn attempts to hook up with Pretty Ricky again. Taking their relationship further, Vinny takes Maria out on a date, with a surprise visit from Uncle Nino.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: A girls' night out spirals out of control when Suzi questions Nikki's relationship with Pauly. Pretty Ricky asks Derynn to take their relationship to the next level. The cugines are given a lesson in pranking by the Prank War Champion.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: On their last day in Vegas, Pauly and Nikki must make a difficult decision about their relationship. Vinny and Maria consider their future together. And Derynn must decide if she will stay in Vegas for Pretty Ricky.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Don't Threaten Me with a Good Time
programme.desc: Bret Michaels, lead singer of rock band Poison, welcomes 25 young ladies to his rocker lair in the hopes of finding that one special girl he can call his own.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Talk Dirty to Me
programme.desc: With 16 girls all fighting for Bret's affection, tensions are run high and alliances are formed as the ladies try to eliminate each other from the competition for Bret's heart, it's “Good Girls” versus “Bad Girls”.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Motocross
programme.desc: Bret challenges the twelve remaining girls to put the pedal to the metal in a motocross relay race, as they learn to ride, they fall, nearly run people over, and even lose an acrylic nail or two.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Riff it Good
programme.desc: Bret wants a woman with a creative side, so he splits the remaining 10 women in teams of 2 for a music challenge, where the girls write lyrics to one of Bret's tracks then perform the song on stage.

programme.title: Rock of Love: First Annual Bret's Mudbowl
programme.desc: Eight girls remain and Bret wants to see who's willing to get down-n-dirty for him in the First Annual Bret's Mudbowl!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Tour Bus Challenge
programme.desc: The next test is The Tour Bus Challenge where the ladies compete in various challenges all relating to the life on the road, the winner getting a solo date.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Show Me Your Hits
programme.desc: This week Bret has arranged for his remaining “sexy six” to shoot an album cover for his latest release.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Superfan Challenge
programme.desc: Bret is down to his “fabulous five” and he's getting serious about finding the right girl so he calls on three of his super fans to interrogate the ladies, and choose the girl they think is best.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Vegas Baby!
programme.desc: It's time to see who can handle Bret's rock star life on the road, so the final four girls take the tour bus heading to Vegas where Bret has a big show.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Only three girls are left in the house and now it's time for their parents to meet Bret.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Loveable high school choir director Bryce Gage has big dreams for his small town of Marble Falls, TX.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Hero - Ying Xiong
programme.desc: Acclaimed by critics and loved by audiences around the world, Jet Li, Maggie Cheung, and Donnie Yen star in this Oscar and Golden Globe-nominated action-packed epic, in which a fearless warrior rises up to defy an empire and unite a nation.

programme.title: Flying Swords Of Dragon Gate
programme.desc: A Ming Dynasty freedom fighter (Jet Li), a female warrior (Zhou Xun) and a corrupt eunuch (Kun Chen) are among those who converge on a remote desert hostel that sits atop a city of treasures.

programme.title: Badges of Fury
programme.desc: In just 3 days, three cases of Smiling Murder shock Hong Kong. The young detective Wang Bu'er and his buddy Huang Feihong embark on an investigation full of excitement and unexpected events.

programme.title: Iron Monkey
programme.desc: Presented by Quentin Tarantino, Iron Monkey is the spirited tale of a mysterious and mythical Chinese legend in this exhilarating non-stop martial arts excitement.

programme.title: Wing Chun
programme.desc: Wing Chun, a talented martial artist, decides to fight against horse thieves in the village to receive respect from the villagers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder investigation in Florida crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman and her daughter didn't return home from shopping, her husband directed police to a nearby mall. The child's body was found, but there was no sign of the wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, funeral director Lonnie Turner, Sr. was found shot to death. His son Lonnie Jr. became the prime suspect, particularly after it was discovered that the murder was committed with his gun. However, he had an alibi for the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Tiffany Rowell and three of her friends were brutally murdered in affluent Clear Lake, Texas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim. Investigators hope manufacturing codes from beer bottles will determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police get a clue about a couple who disappeared on Memorial Day weekend during an in-progress robbery. The evidence found solves a brutal crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called about a dead body, a background check on the victim leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks — all fronted by elderly couple Ray and Faye Copeland.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky's thirteenth anniversary is rapidly approaching. In an outward show of affection, they buy each other gifts—golf clubs for Ricky and fur for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos are being interviewed for a "day-in-the-life" magazine article on happy married couples. The interviewer arrives at 7 AM just in time to encounter Lucy making breakfast in a frilly lace apron, while Ricky walks in wearing a smoking jacket.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes get a pair of new tenants. Sam and Nancy Johnson are from Texas and reportedly have inside knowledge of a certain oil stock that is about to shoot through the roof. Lucy and Ethel are excited by the prospect, but Fred and Ricky have doubts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: How long can Ricky Ricardo go, without losing his temper? When Lucy buys a new hat for $49.50, Ricky goes ballistic. To make a point, Lucy bets Ricky the cost of the hat that he'll lose his temper long before her next purchase.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Hurt that no one seems to care for his home movies, Ricky declares that he will never show them another feature of his...not even the TV pilot he's creating. Jealous of his project, Lucy enables the help of the Mertzes and creates her own musical western.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Lucy desperately wants to accompany her husband on his concert tour of Hawaii, but Ricky can't afford to bring her along. Unsatisfied, Lucy decides she'll win a trip for herself and neighbors, The Mertzes, by entering a television game show contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to be a published author after hearing about another housewife who made a fortune doing it. Ricky and the Mertzes don't like it when they discover Lucy's book plays too close a resemblance to real life including anecdotes from their own lives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Roby and Bleckt visit an injured Lloyd to complete the transfer of Zeatrix's powers as Arin links Bleckt to a clue in his investigation and follows him back to a secret office, where Wyldfyre has an idea to uncover his plans.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Final Game
programme.desc: Arin learns a devastating secret about the Merge and confronts Lloyd as Cole stays behind to protect the dragon horns. Sora faces off against Nokt, and Wyldfyre is too late to stop the manipulation of the games.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Elements of Betrayal
programme.desc: Arin, Zane, and Cole make a shocking discovery in the Monastery of Gates as they defend the Dragon Horns; the depowered Elemental Masters clash with the Wolf Mask army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja follow a clue to Arin's location but find a new threat, while Nya, Kai and Wyldfyre spark old grudges in their search for Jay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Princess Vania reveals a secret entrance that leads to an underground mine beneath Shintaro where the city's dark secrets are held.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja attempt to rescue Cole, but the bickering of his fellow prisoners alerts the Skull Sorcerer, and soon the ninja are prisoners too.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: In order to escape the Skull Sorcerer's chain-gang, the ninja must convince the Munce and Geckles to put aside their distrust and work together.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Jay, Nya and Lloyd are led into the Mines of Shintaro by Murt who brings them back to the Munce "Home-Cave". The Munce Queen takes a liking to Jay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: A party of Geckles suspect Kai and Zane of being in league with the Skull Sorcerer and bring them to their leader who subjects them to a Trial-By-Mino

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Separated from the others, Cole must find his way to the surface to alert King Vangelis of the dangerous Skull Sorcerer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: An entire episode chronicles how Cole, Princess Vania and Master Wu fall down a seemingly endless tunnel, into the bowels of Shintaro Mountain.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole, Wu and Princess Vania befriend a motley group of survivors, called the Lowly, and are told the story of how they too ended up at "Rock-Bottom."

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Having joined forces with the Lowly in their quest to defeat King Vangelis, Cole, Wu, and Vania have to find a way out of the bottom of the mountain.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Nya and Kai, who have become the leaders of the Munce and Geckles, try to unite the tribes and defeat their mutual enemy, the Skull Sorcerer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole, Princess Vania, Wu & the Lowly arrive at a temple in Shintaro Mountain which was once a training ground for Earth Elementals incl. Cole's mother

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: It is Chima's coldest hour … The Hunters have launched their final attack on the Lion City and Mount Cavora. The Tribes, aided by the Phoenix, fight bravely, but all hope rests on uncovering the rest of the eight ancient Fire Wings.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures

programme.desc: Police Chief Wheeler announces the formation of the 700 million dollar Sky Police. Police captain, Tom Bennett, gets a call that his wife has gone into labor early.

programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: A re-energized Luis reaches out to old friends in an effort to close a deal that has eluded him in the past; Fredrik faces competition while trying to win a project; fiancée Emilia has news that catches Ryan off guard.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik takes buyers on a Hudson River cruise to interest them in his new West Side development; Luis and a developer embark on a plan to create a massive unit overlooking Central Park, but one of Ryan's clients may stop them dead in their tracks.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis tries to lure Ryan back to the negotiating table after the two reach a stalemate over the Central Park South unit; Ryan must salvage a deal that falls through after the buyer is arrested; Fredrik will stop at nothing to impress a client.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis will do anything to solidify his standing as a major player, even if it means teaming up with a rival; Fredrik receives devastating news; Ryan uses out-of-the-box thinking to come up with a way to lure brokers to an out-of-the-way listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: At the Metropolitan Tower, Luis and Ryan run into complications while co-listing; Ryan's fiancée, Emilia, gets in the middle of things; Fredrik lands a heavenly listing with a hellish downside.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan tries the buyers' patience while trying out a new pricing strategy for a downtown duplex; Fredrik promises a buyer something his developer may not be able to deliver; Luis and a new co-lister dig a hole for themselves.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik reunites with a former client in the Williamsburg neighborhood; Luis hopes to repair his rocky relationship with a rebellious co-lister; Ryan tackles an enormous townhouse that may be too big for most New Yorkers.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: A telephone call breathes new life into a development project, but it comes with a catch Fredrik never saw coming; Ryan bends over backward for a potential buyer but receives nothing in return; Luis gets first dibs on a hot new Tribeca building.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: For a new development in the NoHo neighborhood, Fredrik summons the spirit of a dead icon; after a failed shot, Luis chases down one of New York City's biggest developers; Ryan picks up a penthouse in the Flatiron District with a difficult co-lister.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan's relationship with his co-lister hangs by a thread, prompting him to try something new; Luis finds himself caught in the middle while trying to please a married couple; Fredrik hopes a rival will save him after the developer raises prices.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis lands a listing with a former broker who helped him launch his career; Fredrik struggles to sell a $30 billion penthouse in Tribeca; Ryan tries to save his skin after showing too much of someone else's in a marketing campaign.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik confronts a broker who is circling his $30 million penthouse like a vulture; Luis will do anything for a buyer and dog; a delighted Ryan lands a listing that previously belonged to Fredrik.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis faces an emotional crossroads; Fredrik tries to cash in on a NoHo loft that once was the site of the country's largest bank robbery; in Tribeca, Ryan tries to succeed where Fredrik failed.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan trades his suit for a more unique outfit after landing a building in Hell's Kitchen; Luis' idea of having a business partner gets more complicated when an open house challenges him to think about his future; Fredrik goes to London.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis tries to figure out what's been confusing him lately while hoping to land a building on Park Avenue South; Ryan goes after the one listing that got away from him; Ryan shows up at Fredrik's launch party.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Ryan's Wedding
programme.desc: Ryan and Emilia deal with complications while planning their wedding, which will take place in Greece; Ryan is preoccupied with his new building in Greenpoint, while Emilia is overwhelmed with her growing to-do list.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Kim Hunter guest stars as Hannah O'Connel a brilliant but superstitious criminal who escapes to a Caribbean country and is drawn into a voodoo ceremony by the IMF to locate a cache of stolen gold she has hidden away.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Laraine Stephens guest stars as the beautiful wife of a crime syndicate boss who becomes the target of both the underworld and the Impossible Missions Force when she has her husband killed and steals his records of the syndicate's operations.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Elizabeth Ashley guest stars as a beautiful IMF agent who becomes the key to determining if enemy agent Nicholai Varsi is telling the truth when he claims he's defecting to the United States.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: George Maharis guest stars as John Bachman, an underworld figure with access to the syndicate's top secret computerized records who is convinced by the IMF that he has found the fountain of youth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: William Windom guest stars as Paul Mitchell, a boxing promoter tied to a crime syndicate who becomes a target of the IMF when one of his fighters is killed before he can talk to the police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A breathtaking motorcycle chase over the hills of San Francisco figures prominently in the IMF's plan to recover three tons of the drug commonly known as speed from Sam Hibbing's illegal drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Singer Barbara McNair guest stars as Jena Cole, the beautiful leader of a band of jewel thieves who falls in love with Barney who himself has infiltrated her operation to recover the stolen crown jewels of a foreign nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: IMF team leader Dan Briggs assembles his team for the first time. His team includes a master of disguise, a femme fatale, an electronics whiz, an incredibly strong man, and a safecracker.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln must beat each of his sisters to the couch in order to watch the finale of his favorite show; Lincoln leaves a scathing voicemail on Lori's phone, and quickly realizes that he must erase it before she hears it.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln is tired of his sisters' meddling until he is being picked on at school; Lincoln records his sisters' most embarrassing moments.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln has a plan to get the best seat in the car for a long road trip; Lincoln needs to prove he is mature so he can sit at the adult table.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln uses sound-canceling ear buds to try and drown out his sisters; after Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room for one night.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln hatches a plan to capture the perfect family photograph for his parents' anniversary gift; Lincoln and his sisters make a bet on who can go the longest without engaging in their most annoying habits.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her; when someone clogs the toilet, Lincoln investigates to find the culprit.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.desc: Lincoln must care for the class tarantula; Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nojiko continues the story of Nami’s younger days. Back in the present, Nami gets agonizingly close to a long time goal, but betrayal looms on the horizon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nezumi comes to confiscate Nami’s treasure, but who’s he working for? More importantly, who’s Nami working for, and what’s she gonna do with her booty?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats’ faith in Nami is restored, and now it’s time for a battle royal! Luffy and the gang are determined to make Arlong pay for mistreating their friend.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and Arlong’s fishermen are locked in a swashbuckling slugfest, but things take a bad turn when Luffy gets trapped beneath the waves.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While his friends work to free the captain of the Straw Hats, cowardly Usopp finds himself in a position to shed his yellow streak and make his father proud.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami must decide between letting Arlong maintain his hold over her, or joining the Straw Hats and leading the oppressed villagers against the tyrant Fishman.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Arlong better watch his back-fins, because Captain Luffy knows about all the horrible things he did to Nami – and it makes his blood boil.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Something about Nami’s former prison gives Luffy an added burst of strength. He’s so moved by her terrible past that he vows to destroy all of Arlong Park!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a grueling fight, Luffy defeats Arlong and succeeds in destroying his headquarters. The merry marauders enjoy the fruits of victory while Nami makes peace with her turbulent past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Finally, the day has arrived where Luffy’s face is on an authentic wanted poster! Now there are enemies in hot pursuit as the crew makes waves for Logue Town – the final resting place of Gold Roger!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Buggy gets marooned on an island inhabited by unusual creatures and tangles with the island’s caretaker, Gaimon. If he is to finally destroy Luffy, Buggy must cast his lot with a mysterious woman.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Buggy Pirates fight each other for the right to take their lost captain’s place. While they’re busy beating each other’s brains out, a cannibalistic tribe makes plans to have something special for dinner.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats arrive at Logue Town, and each crewmember embarks upon a mission of a more personal nature. While his crew shops, Luffy goes in search of sacred ground.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy has a run-in with Captain Smoker, and his failure to keep a low profile helps Buggy draw a bead on him. Elsewhere, Zoro takes a chance that his skill can overcome a dangerous curse.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp finds an amazing pair of sharpshooter’s goggles, but they lead to a run-in with Daddy the Parent – the greatest gunslinger ever! Now, the Straw Hat marksman is headed for the deadliest of all duels.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A cooking competition with the fiery chef Carmen rekindles Sanji’s dreams of the legendary All Blue.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Buggy and his mysterious female ally trap Luffy on the same platform where Gold Roger was executed. He is to be killed for his offenses against Buggy, but Zoro and Sanji attempt a daring rescue mission.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As a storm batters Logue Town, Buggy, Alvida, and Captain Smoker close in on Luffy for a stirring final showdown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The discovery of a small girl adrift in an abandoned lifeboat interrupts Luffy and his crew’s voyage to the Grand Line.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After escaping the clutches of the Marine fleet, the Straw Hats soon find themselves in an equally dangerous predicament – stranded in the Calm Belt!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats want to return Apis’s dragon to his nest, but the Marines have them surrounded. Looks like it’s time for another daring escape!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Even for Nami, finding the dragon’s lost island proves to be tougher than looking for a needle in a haystack – or at the bottom of the ocean.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami discovers a map to the true location of the dragon’s nest, and Zorro puts his steel to the test against Eric the Whirlwind.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats sail headfirst into Commodore Nelson and his Marine armada. While Luffy, Sanji, and Zoro dodge cannon balls, Eric the Whirlwind prepares a sneak attack!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their rescue mission taking on water, the Straw Hats get some surprising help from the great blue yonder.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After unlocking the secrets of the dragon’s nest, Luffy does battle with Eric the Whirlwind to ensure the safety of the island. Don’t mess with the rubberman!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hat crew takes a wild ride up and down a mountain only to end up in the belly of a giant whale that’s on the lookout for pirates!

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Days before the New Millennium, a jailed informant calls the NYPD with a cryptic tip about a murder, sending detectives on a hunt through dozens of New York's high-rise buildings, in search of a crime scene - and a body.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Two young women come to New York with big city dreams, but a chance encounter triggers a sequence of events that shatters those dreams forever; detectives must piece together a series of puzzling clues to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Roger Brooks, popular maître d' at one of the oldest restaurants in New York, is found slain in his apartment on the city's famous Restaurant Row; detectives discover a hidden side to the victim, and the chilling possibility of other victims.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When a young banker disappears, police piece together her final moments, leading them to a professional who's not as he presents himself.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: After the brutal murder of a beloved Queens gay man, a community bands together while a detective goes undercover to catch the killers.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Everyone in East Harlem knows Jason Adams and is shocked when his body is found stabbed; detectives are stumped until a tip from an unexpected source points them toward the killer.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Talented performer Jennifer Stahl and four friends are discovered shot execution-style above New York's iconic Carnegie Deli in the theater district; when the news breaks, the entire city fears there's a cold-blooded killer on the loose.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: A mass shooting in Chelsea leaves one dead and three injured; the detective discovers this is the latest in a series of murders spanning multiple precincts; investigators find themselves plunged into the underground world of New York's bouncers.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: NYPD detectives race to unravel the strange murder of one of their own before a devious killer slips out of the country.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: An indie film star is found dead in Greenwich Village, the victim of an apparent suicide; as detectives discover one eerie clue after another, they realize things aren't what they seem.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When police discover two murdered lovers in East Harlem, a stolen phone leads them on a journey into the heart of New York's criminal underground and beyond.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When a prominent Russian businessman goes missing from a ritzy neighborhood in Staten Island, investigators believe the Russian mob is to blame; the case takes a series of hairpin turns to reveal the most unlikely of suspects.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: NYPD detectives hunt for the killer who tortured and executed a beloved New York City public school teacher; they discover the victim is the son of a powerful businessman.

programme.title: New York Homicide

programme.title: She-Wolves: England’s Early Queens

programme.title: The American West

programme.title: The Harlem Hellfighters Great War

programme.title: The Hidden Faith of the Founding Fathers

programme.title: Sex, Lies & Murder

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles

programme.title: Battleplan

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: Special Operations are the cutting edge of modern warfare. Behind-the-lines, unseen, undertaken by small numbers of elite personnel, they can cover everything from intelligence gathering or raiding to the achievement of major strategic objectives.

programme.title: Battlefield Mysteries
programme.desc: Normandy, August 1944. The highest scoring German Panzer Ace, Michael Wittmann, was killed during a counter-attack against British and Canadian tanks. Wittmann’s death went unexamined until his remains were found in 1983.

programme.title: Battlefield Mysteries
programme.desc: The Wooden Mosquito was the queen of the skies in 1943 – 1944. The Germans had nothing to match this beautiful aircraft. The Mosquito turned the tables on the Luftwaffer, and the hunter became the hunted.

programme.title: Battlefield Mysteries
programme.desc: The siege of Malta was the most important battle in 1941 – 1942. The courage of the Maltese civilians in the face of indescribable bombing and the amazing Spitfire pilots helped turn the tide in this critical, but little appreciated campaign.

programme.desc: Es el primer día de la Liga Pokémon, y cuando Ash y sus amigos descubren que su primera batalla será en el Campo de Agua, están llenos de consejos.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Al continuar la Liga Pokémon, Ash lucha en el Campo de Roca, ¡y tiene un encuentro con el Equipo Rocket luego de que instalan un Centro Pokémon falso para atraer a los Entrenadores incautos!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Ash enfrenta a su más duro oponente hasta ahora en el Campo de Planta en la Liga Pokémon! ¿Están él y su Bulbasaur listos para enfrentar a su oponente y a su poderoso Scyther?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash conoce a un Entrenador parecido llamado Richie en la Liga Pokémon, los dos chicos pronto se vuelven amigos cercanos, ¡al igual que sus dos Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡En la quinta ronda de la Liga Pokémon, Ash y Richie se enfrentan uno al otro! ¿Sobrevivirá su amistad esta importante batalla?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Misty y Brock están en las gradas vitoreando a Richie cuando la Liga Pokémon llega a su fin y marchan juntos en las ceremonias de clausura. ¡Es una experiencia que acompañará a Ash durante todo su viaje como Entrenador!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos regresan a Pueblo Paleta con una gran bienvenida, ¡sólo para ser enviados a otro viaje de inmediato! El Profesor Oak busca una misteriosa Pokébola, y le pide a Ash, Brock y Misty que la encuentren para él.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Los chicos deben viajar a la Isla Valencia para traer una misteriosa Pokébola para el Profesor Oak. Cuando Ash gana un viaje gratis en dirigible, parece que sus penurias terminaron, pero, ¿quién pilotea esta cosa?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras un aterrizaje forzoso en la Isla Valencia, los chicos van al laboratorio de la Profesora Ivy, donde está la misteriosa Pokébola. Brock se asombra al descubrir que la profesora y sus colegas también son criadores Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Gracias a la canción de Jigglypuff, el dirigible de Ash y Misty da vuelta a casa, se sale de curso y se estrella en una isla, donde conocen a un nuevo amigo llamado Tracey mientras intenta ayudar a un Lapras perdido.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Misty y Tracey salen a explorar las Islas Naranja, ¡y Ash está decidido a calificar en la Liga Naranja! Pronto descubre que los desafíos del Equipo Naranja son un poco diferentes a las batallas de otros gimnasios.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash, Misty y Tracey llegan a la Isla Mandarina, Pikachu y Togepi se rebelan y se unen a unos Pokémon furiosos. Cuando los Pokémon desaparecen, la Oficial Jenny les habla de la desaparición de docenas de Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash encuentra un mensaje en una botella, el cual lleva a nuestros héroes a una nueva aventura en la Isla Sunburst, y a la búsqueda de un Onix muy especial.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes se encuentran en la Isla Pinkan, hogar de un gran número de Pokémon de colores extraños. Ash y Tracey quedan fascinados con estos Pokémon rosas… ¡al igual que el Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras unirse a una expedición científica para investigar el fósil de un Kabuto, Ash y sus amigos pronto se encuentran enfrentando una serie de desastres naturales.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Otro especialista en los Pokémon tipo Agua reta a Misty a una batalla y le ofrece un consejo: ¡él cree que el Psyduck de Misty está listo para evolucionar!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: La exploración de nuestros héroes los lleva a las Islas Toronja, ¡donde se enteran de que la famosa fruta de la isla ha estado desapareciendo! Ash, Misty y Tracey salen a atrapar a quien sea responsable.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: El Equipo Rocket se estrella en una isla y Meowth es el centro de atención pues lo confunden con el "Gran Meowth Pródigo", una poderosa criatura de la cual habla una profecía. ¿Qué sucederá cuando descubran la verdad?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un joven adolescente pierde el control de sus brazos y piernas en una pijamada y tiene que ser tratado en la sala de emergencias; una mujer recibe un tiro en la pierna en su propia fiesta de despedida de soltera.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: En la víspera de Navidad, un hombre vestido como Santa está cerca de la muerte: su esposa le pide a su médico un favor especial: cosechar el semen de su esposo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre piensa que está estreñido, pero su condición es potencialmente mortal; un médico que trata a una mujer con un paro cardíaco descubre que está tratando a dos pacientes en uno; y la familia del paciente no tiene ni idea.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico de urgencias debe inventar nuevas formas creativas para salvar a un niño que se está ahogando y a un hombre cuya mano está cubierta de alquitrán; el embarazo de una mujer es una feliz sorpresa.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.desc: The crew races against the clock to prevent a catastrophic explosion.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor's interest in Seven's social development becomes more than clinical.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A look back at her ancestor's history does not give Janeway the whole story.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager's future depends on Seven's success in preventing the past.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: An alien weapon that possesses artificial intelligence begins to terrorize the crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Another Federation starship in the Delta Quadrant brings trouble for Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Starfleet's honor is tested when two captains fight a battle of wills.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Visitors from the past present Seven with an opportunity to right a wrong.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: B'Elanna struggles with questions of the afterlife and her Klingon heritage.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor's overactive imagination leads Voyager into real trouble.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay (David Hewlett) volunteers to be the first to try Beckett's (Paul McGillion) newest ATA gene therapy. But things go wrong when the device cannot be removed, and is stopping Dr. McKay from being able to eat or drink and endangering his life.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The Stargate team must rush to save Major John Sheppard (Joe Flanigan) after he becomes lodged in the Stargate, with only 38 minutes until the gate automatically disengages, and Sheppard is expelled into space, where he will surely asphyxiate.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After several attacks by the Wraiths, Dr. Elizabeth Weir contemplates if there is a spy among the team, with all signs pointing to Teyla. Feeling betrayed by the team's suspicions, the Athosians move to a newly discovered land.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard (Joe Flanigan), Dr. Weir (Torri Higginson), and the rest of the team visit a new planet, M7G-677, where no one is older than 24 thanks to a ritual suicide that the citizens believe is keeping the Wraith at bay.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the situation onboard the Destiny dire, General O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and Homeworld Command order Col. Young to execute a high-risk plan concocted by the IOA scientists which, in theory, could return the crew to Earth.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After making a surprising discovery on a jungle planet, members of the team become ill. In an attempt to isolate the infection, the team sets up camp in the jungle. But when night falls, the illness will be the least of their worries.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Using the communications stones, Lt. Scott and Camile Wray use their time back on Earth to visit those they’ve left behind. Aboard Destiny, the crew stumbles upon a piece of Ancient technology that carries the promise of a way home.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Everyone is shocked when a member of the crew is found dead from a gunshot wound. While it appears to be suicide, the gun is nowhere to be found…until it shows up in Col. Young’s (Louis Ferreira) quarters and he becomes the number one suspect.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 discovers three human survivors on an off-world planet who claim to be under attack by hostile aliens. While Carter helps repair the ship's computer, she learns that the survivors are hiding a secret…and things may not be all they seem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Teal'c mysteriously begins to hallucinate and is haunted by visions of an existence where he is a human being. As his paranoia deepens, Teal'c must rely on the help of friend Daniel Jackson to determine where his dreams end...and his reality begins.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 accompanies the X-53 on its voyage into deep space. When the ship drops out of hyperspace, SG-1 is stranded with no means of getting back to Earth. Their only option lies in exploring a nearby planet where a Stargate is thought to be located.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters a civilization desperate to be freed from the clutches of a Goa'uld. While on the planet, Jonas falls ill. His illness is diagnosed as a brain tumor but it gives him the ability to see the future...where SG-1 are walking into a trap!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel appears to O'Neill and alerts him that Anubis has located the Eye of Ra, an object of power hidden on Abydos. With Daniel's help, SG-1 find the Eye first. Determined to have it, Anubis threatens to destroy the planet unless they hand it over.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As SG-1 begins its search for the Lost City, they discover that Jackson has been returned by the Ancients without any memory of who he was. While SG-1 tries to help him regain his memory, they discover that the Lost City is not on the same planet.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny channels an old friend's tactics, allowing him to pick just the right unit; Brandi flexes her muscles on a dusty locker; Ivy does his best to look beneath the surface, while Rene and Casey gamble big on an even bigger room.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy Calvin takes a seat along with Barry and Kenny to talk pigeons, turtles and the secrets of making a living as a storage buyer; the casts recount the craziest things they've ever heard Laura say and share their worst locker buying experiences.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi and Jarrod bring an old friend along to do some heavy lifting; Ivy finds his fun in the little things; Mary discovers where her bread is really buttered; Shana and Edwina crack themselves up with some snappy accessories.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny's fear of sharks inspires a controversial wardrobe choice; Rene brings his bargain army along to try and intimidate the competition while he gets his slice of the loot; Darrell won't take no for an answer, moving full-steam ahead.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Victorville, a friendly duel runs Dusty up, but his vinyl might save him; Ivy's locker shines some light on the business; Lisa learns that she needs her locker about as much as she needs a hole in her head.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary launches a daring idea while Ivy keeps it old school and targets a working man's unit; Rene wants to focus on the lockers, but Dave gets in the way.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders peruse lockers in Mission Viejo, Calif.; Jarrod and Brandi uncover an unusual piece of art; Barry's accountant tries to keep him in check.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers venture into downtown Los Angeles, where they participate in a vault auction; Jarrod and Brandi put all their marbles in some mystery boxes.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The treasure seekers visit Riverside, Calif.; Brandi and Jarrod attempt to teach Bozek a valuable lesson; Ivy hopes to bid low and win big; Darrell and Brandon's latest score may leave them all wet.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders scrounge for a high-end score in Santa Ana, Calif.; Jarrod and Ivy go on buying sprees that leave the competition reeling; Rene waits for the perfect moment to pounce.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry hires two psychics to "see" inside storage lockers; Jarrod and Brandi hope to save their store by taking a gamble on a unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy hunts for high-end items in Moreno Valley; Jarrod reveals his alter ego to Brandi; Darrell flies solo; Rene has a close encounter with death.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Laura's on her own in Moreno Valley, and she's anything but discreet about the reasons; Brandi cooks up a nice profit; Rene's doll locker yields a couple surprises, while Ivy dabbles with a bit of the supernatural.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it’s supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn’t going to come this year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony hurts her leg and must stay in bed instead of heading off for a grand adventure.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry’s cat Custard is shown to live a pampered, adored existence in Strawberry’s house. But Custard’s dream set-up is shattered by the sudden arrival of a rambunctious stray puppy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much-needed vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the girls learn their tropical island vacation is cancelled due to weather, Orange decides to build an exact replica of the resort at home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Just as the girls are about to enjoy a vacation at their homemade resort, TV host Mavis Maraschino shows up to do a segment on Cherry Jam and disrupts their plans.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The beginning of winter brings a brief spell of springlike weather, ruining everyone's hopes for winter fun. With help from Strawberry, the community adapts to the changing conditions.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry's invention of parasol-powered ice skates is all the rage, landing her the opportunity to create her own musical commercial for them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When both Raspberry and Berrykin Bruce plan spring-themed events for the same location, Strawberry helps them work out a compromise—they combine their efforts to create a spring fashion show around a water show.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the rainbow fountain stops working, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Plumber and fixes the fountain so that everyone can cool off. // Getting ready for her royal party, Kiki turns purple when she accidentally picks Plumenberries instead of Rainbow Berries.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When young Jessy is afraid of going to the hair salon, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Hairdresser to show Jessy just how fun a visit to the salon can be. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a Dentist to help Jessy with a painful new tooth.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a babysitter to help babysit Jessy who, because of eating a magic bean, has grown into a giant baby! // Rainbow Ruby becomes a choreographer to help Thunderbell apologize to his friend, Mr. Sloth, in a truly musical way.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Kiki's crown loses a jewel, Rainbow Ruby becomes an Archaeologist and follows a map to an ancient treasure. // It's New Year's in Rainbow Village and everyone has gathered for the special dumpling feast.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Conniving Peppermint Fizz talks the other kids into a competition to see whose pet is best. Peppermint cheats so that her pet, Cola Chameleon, wins best pet.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is feeling left out of all the kids’ play. She’s the only one with four legs. There’s no one like her to talk to and share her feelings.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is excited that the ponies of Ice Cream Island have invited her to take part in their annual Festival of the Horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Angel Cake likes everything 'just so' — and when things don’t go her way, she’s a pretty bad sport.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Peppermint Fizz is so determined to win the Nearly Once-A-Yearly Strawberryland Games.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry & Friends go on an overnight campout, Ginger Snap doesn’t want them to find out, she’s afraid of the dark!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: There’s someone…or something strange in the neighborhood, and the kids imagine the worst.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls' new band is about to go on the road to a concert at Berry Big City. But first they must teach the Berrykins all about their businesses, so the little folk can keep the community running until the girls return.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: On his way to Berry Big City to open a home for stray dogs, Huckleberry Pie’s Pet-Mobile gets stuck. He is rescued by Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry entices Huckleberry to come for a visit by asking him to team up and write a mystery story for an online mystery magazine.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry’s Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by the online mystery magazine, Strawberry comes up with a new way to raise funds for Huckleberry’s pet shelter—a big dog show!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum’s plan to direct a small, simple fairy tale play as a surprise performance for the Baby Berrykins snowballs out of control when she hears of the same play being done on a grand scale in a big city theater.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Drafted by the girls to play Prince Berry Charming in a community play, Huck pushes aside his reluctance and tries to not disappoint them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huckleberry pitch their new play, an adaptation of the Berrykin Kids’ favorite BerryFairyTale 'The Littlest Berrykin' to their friends.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Cleaners kidnap Wyatt and erase his existence, after the child accidentally brings a dragon to life. When Piper, Phoebe and Paige regain their memories they relive the day Wyatt was kidnapped.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When three evil sisters magically steal the Charmed Ones' identities and powers, Piper, Phoebe and Paige must convince Chris that they are the real Charmed Ones in order to get their lives back.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: While on a temp job, Paige meets an attractive male witch named Richard and wants to help end the magical feud between his and another magical family.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Halliwell sisters attempt to escape magical alternate realities where their secret desires come true, after Chris uses the demon Gith to try to teach them a lesson.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: In an attempt to save her boss' soul, Paige goes behind her sisters backs and makes a deal with a demon. Meanwhile, Piper learns that Wyatt has been sabotaging her dates.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares…and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: Tom and Kevin build a basic poplar and plywood entry shelf. Scott wires basement outlets and lighting. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard shares "dos and don'ts" of hooking up an icemaker.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Scott helps replaces an undersized ceiling fan with a more appropriate one. The guys ask "What Is It?" Later, Roger visits a bonsai nursery to learn the art of sculpting trees.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
